creator: xcene@beauty.net
text:
With the above prompt, in tcsh, using the normal textmode system console,
when scrolling starts, the cursor disappears and is gone until i do a
'clear'.

Also, if i type a long command line, like
'echo hello hello hello hello hello hello hello hello hello hello hello',
and then backspace it, the cursor jumps up a line and everything looks
rather mangled.

Fix: 

Using a 1-line prompt, but I can't fit so much info into one line =)
How-To-Repeat: 
See description.
